formatRules.description: Auto-indent based on Visual Basic block context

rules.description: Indent after Then on its own line

rules.pattern: ^\s*(End If|End For|End While|Loop|End Select|End With|End Try|End Sub|End Function|End Property|End Class|End Structure|End Module|End Namespace|End Using|End SyncLock|End Enum|End Interface|Else|ElseIf|Catch|Finally|Case|Next)\b

indentation.decreasePattern: ^\s*(End If|End For|End While|Loop|End Select|End With|End Try|End Sub|End Function|End Property|End Class|End Structure|End Module|End Namespace|End Using|End SyncLock|End Enum|End Interface|Else|ElseIf|Catch|Finally|Case|Next)\b
